summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RE'ACTIF PRO Workflow Features (8 new modules). All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all workflow tabs: Vue rapide, Synthèse IA, Entretiens, Plan d'action, Export/Bilan. All AI-powered features working correctly with real OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini integration via Emergent LLM Key.
critical_code_review_comments: All workflow endpoints properly implemented with AI integration
Frontend components correctly integrated with backend APIs
data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements
Proper error handling and loading states implemented
AI generation calls have appropriate timeout handling
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob meyer beneficiary linked to bob23 user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 workflow modules fully tested and working: 1) Synthèse pré-entretien IA - generates AI summary with points forts, vigilance, freins, questions. 2) Compte rendu d'entretien IA - generates professional interview reports with copy/validate buttons. 3) Plan d'action intelligent - generates action plans with categories, deadlines, status updates. 4) Vue lecture rapide - shows identity, progression, risk score, diagnostic cards. 5) Export intelligent - exports dossier in text format with copy/download. 6) Détection de décrochage - computes risk scores with factors. 7) Bilan de fin de parcours - generates final assessment with recommendations. All AI features use real OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini via emergentintegrations library.

frontend_components: Partner login flow via 'Inscription partenaire' -> 'Se connecter' tab ✓
Bénéficiaires tab with bob meyer card ✓
Vue rapide tab: identity, progression 15%, risk score 0 (faible), diagnostic cards ✓
Synthèse IA tab: AI-generated content with points forts, vigilance, freins, questions ✓
Entretiens tab: Nouveau compte rendu form, AI generation, expandable reports, copy/validate buttons ✓
Plan d'action tab: actions list with categories, deadlines, status dropdowns, dispositifs recommandés ✓
Export/Bilan tab: export dossier with copy/download, bilan final with synthèse globale ✓
